creator: luca.pizzamiglio@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 161498
VMFORMATS and VMSIZE honored by release.sh

Using a release.conf file, it seems that it's possible to change the default VMFORMATS that are built. Running the scripts, the default value is considered instead.

Analyzing the release.sh script, it seems that some VM related variable are not correctly handled/reported.

The submitted patch could be a solution, but a review from the maintainer is needed. It could be, that some release.conf knobs are still missing.
